iran_nuke.notes: Oman breakthrough (Feb 27): Iran agreed to never stockpile enriched uranium and full IAEA verification. No weapons-grade enrichment signals. Nuclear track de-escalated. However, Israel killed top Iranian nuclear scientists in recent strikes — could shift Iranian calculus toward weapons development long-term. No immediate nuclear escalation signals. 1,348 Iranian civilians killed, 3.2M displaced.

iran_conventional.notes: Day 13-14. MAJOR ESCALATION: Iran now laying mines in Strait of Hormuz using small boats (NYT/Guardian). Shipping virtually halted. New Supreme Leader Mojtaba Khamenei vows Hormuz stays closed, warns US bases attacked unless shut down. Oil testing $120/bbl again (highest in 4 years). Iran set 3 peace conditions: recognition of rights, reparations, guarantees against future aggression. 1,348 Iranian civilians killed, 17,000+ injured, 3.2M displaced. Israel striking Tehran AND Beirut simultaneously. Trump says war 'soon' over but won't commit to timeline. US military plane crashed in Iraq. First 6 days cost US $11.3B. CNN: Trump admin had NO plan for Hormuz closure.

israel_lebanon.notes: Day 13. Israel striking both Beirut AND Tehran simultaneously. 70+ killed in Lebanon strikes on Thursday. Lebanese University hit, faculty killed. 800,000+ displaced, 680+ total killed in Lebanon. 210+ Hezbollah rockets since March 2. Israel signals 'long campaign.' Sweeping evacuation order for southern Lebanon (25 miles). Hezbollah not yet launched 100+ single barrage but sustained rocket fire continues.

turkey.notes: Iranian missiles intercepted over Turkish airspace (2 incidents). NATO Article 4 discussions. Erdogan warns Iran but insists Turkey is 'on side of peace.' NATO forces building up off coast of Cyprus. Iranian drone hit UK base in Cyprus — proximity to Turkish interests. No Article 5 or mobilization.

india.notes: No India-Pakistan border buildup. Pakistan deployed army to Gilgit-Skardu to suppress pro-Iran protests. Shiite demonstrators attacked UN observer offices in Azad Kashmir. Conflict remains Pakistan internal/India-adjacent, not bilateral. No nuclear rhetoric.

russia.notes: Russia calls on US/Israel to stop attacks and negotiate. Kremlin signals intent to expand demands on Ukraine/NATO. Europe alarmed US spending weapons in ME that were earmarked for Ukraine. Russia continues arms supply to Iran. No direct ME involvement. Occupies ~20% Ukraine.

china.notes: Chinese flights around Taiwan paused ~2 weeks, resumed March 13. Trump delaying Taiwan arms sale for Trump-Xi summit (Mar 31-Apr 2). De-escalatory posture. DPRK condemns US ME attacks — China notably silent on conflict. Zone: deterrent.

north_korea.notes: DPRK Foreign Ministry condemned US-Israel attacks on Iran as 'destroying regional peace.' Kim inspected weapons factory. No missile or nuclear tests. DPRK aligning rhetoric with China/Russia anti-US position but no military action.

russia_ukraine.notes: Occupies ~20% Ukraine. Russia continuing offensive operations. US weapons diverted to ME conflict alarming European allies. Kremlin sees opportunity to expand demands while US attention elsewhere. No WMD use, no NATO direct involvement.

latest_news.headline: Iran laying mines in Strait of Hormuz using small boats to enforce closure
latest_news.text: US officials say Iran is using smaller boats (not naval vessels) to lay mines and enforce Hormuz closure. Shipping virtually halted.

latest_news.headline: New Supreme Leader Khamenei vows Hormuz stays closed, warns US bases attacked unless shut
latest_news.text: Mojtaba Khamenei (new Supreme Leader) says Strait of Hormuz will remain closed. Warns US bases will be attacked unless shut down.

latest_news.headline: Oil testing $120/barrel again — highest in 4 years despite 400M barrel reserve release
latest_news.text: Oil prices surged above $100/barrel again, testing $120 threshold. Coalition of 30+ countries releasing 400M barrels from emergency reserves but no relief.

latest_news.headline: Israel strikes Tehran and Beirut simultaneously — Iranian nuclear scientists killed
latest_news.text: Israeli airstrikes pound both Tehran and Beirut. Top Iranian nuclear scientists killed according to Israel. 13th-14th day of war.

latest_news.headline: Iran sets 3 conditions for peace: recognition, reparations, guarantees against future aggression
latest_news.text: President Pezeshkian outlines conditions to end war: recognition of Tehran's rights, reparations, international guarantees. No active negotiation yet.

latest_news.headline: Trump admin had NO plan for Iran closing Strait of Hormuz — classified briefings reveal
latest_news.text: CNN: Senior Trump officials told lawmakers in classified briefings they did not plan for Hormuz closure. Former officials call it 'inexcusable' given decades of planning tradition.

latest_news.headline: US military plane crashes in Iraq — first 6 days of Iran war cost $11.3B
latest_news.text: US military plane crashed in Iraq. 8 US service members killed in war so far. Pentagon says first 6 days cost $11.3 billion.

latest_news.headline: Iran civilian death toll: 1,348 killed, 17,000+ injured, 3.2M displaced
latest_news.text: UN reports up to 3.2 million people displaced inside Iran. Iran's UN rep says 1,348 civilians killed, 17,000+ injured since Feb 28.

outlook: CRITICAL ESCALATION: Iran has shifted from missile/drone attacks to mine warfare in Strait of Hormuz — classic blockade enforcement. Shipping virtually halted. Oil testing $120/bbl. New Supreme Leader taking hardline stance. Trump admin reportedly unprepared for Hormuz closure. Israel now striking both Tehran and Beirut simultaneously, killing Iranian nuclear scientists — potential long-term nuclear catalyst. Iran president set peace conditions but no active negotiations. 1,348 Iranian civilians dead. Watch for: oil crossing $150, Hormuz mine clearance attempt, Iran nuclear posture shift after scientist killings, US military casualties mounting, Turkey response to Cyprus proximity, any nuclear rhetoric from either side.
